Exclusive Portfolio

Global Asset Allocation

Handpicked high-potential projects by Crestline Advisory, exclusively for APAC investors.

Why These 3 Locations?

In overseas property investment, "Location" outweighs "Price". DingYao and Crestline Advisory leverage big data and on-site due diligence to filter out 95% of average listings, retaining only top-tier Gated Communities in the "Wine Route", "University Core", and "Embassy Belt".

24/7 Security Strong Rental Demand Stable Capital Growth

Cape Town Northern Suburbs

Durbanville Luxury Manor

ZAR 16.5M

Proj. Growth

8% p.a.
